extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIČ attacked the 18.6km Monte Lussari mountain TT, overcame mid-climb mechanical, won by 40 seconds to overturn 26-second GC deficit and beat THOMAS by 14 seconds overall
tactical_patterns: ROGLIČ started faster than THOMAS on flatter opening section before climb, banking time pre-ascent rather than waiting for steeps
THOMAS stopped longer at bike exchange changing both bike AND helmet, losing crucial seconds in transition execution
SEPP KUSS's +2 second intermediate time for teammate ROGLIČ provided critical intel on what advantage was needed at checkpoint

rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: recovered 40+ seconds after mid-climb mechanical disaster, showing exceptional mental resilience after 2020 mountain TT GC loss trauma
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: faded on steep gradients in final kilometers after strong flat/transition sections, suggesting insufficient high-gradient TT specificity preparation
rider_signals.McNULTY Brandon: positive: posted strong early benchmark time as stage winner candidate, confirming UAE's mountain TT depth beyond POGACAR
rider_signals.PINOGIL Thymen: negative: took virtual lead then suffered mechanical while in hot seat, losing podium contention at worst possible moment
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: neutral: held third at 59 seconds but couldn't threaten top two, securing first Portuguese GT podium since 1970s
